CCZeq2¶

Given two functions in univariate form, returns true if they are CCZ-equivalent and false otherwise

Returns the linear Code with columns (1,x,f(x))

CF is in utils.rst.

1function CCZeq2(F1,F2)
2    R:=Parent(F1);
3    F<a>:=BaseRing(R);
4    n:=Degree(F);
5    f1:=func<x | Evaluate(F1,x) >;
6    f2:=func<x | Evaluate(F2,x) >;
7    return IsIsomorphic(CF(f1),CF(f2));
8end function;
